handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `ent_` + resolve resets_at from period at insert time
creating → refuse if kind=pool AND period IS NULL (invariant)
updating (value_cap changed by platform admin) → set is_platform_overridden=true + fire EntitlementOverridden
updating (value_used decreased to 0 via reset) → fire EntitlementReset
deleting → refuse when active EntitlementUsage rows in current period (soft delete only)
creating → populate ULID prefix `use_` + denormalise `key` from parent Entitlement
